creator: rleigh@codelibre.net
text:
Sorry for the delay.  I retested with the latest patch and it all works for me.

One minor discrepancy: the default build target for ice runs the unit tests, but the default target for py-ice does not (make test runs them though).  Not sure if that's intentional or by design.  In both cases TESTS was enabled with "make config".


Regards,
Roger
